About the Artist

Babi Abd Elghani is an Algerian visual artist and digital content creator born on August 30, 1994. Hailing from the heart of the Algerian Sahara, specifically from the ancient city of Aïn Salah, his artistic talent has been refined through specialized academic training at the School of Fine Arts, combining advanced technical skills with deep cultural understanding.

His artistic work reflects profound connections to the desert environment; drawing inspiration from its stillness, the gradients of its sands, and the authenticity of its heritage—transforming these elements into expressive dimensions that he reinterprets through a contemporary visual perspective. Abd Elghani's artistic project focuses on bridging the gap between traditional visual arts and modern digital art, seeking to document the cultural identity of South Algeria and present it to the world in an innovative and renewed creative manner.
